overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a first-person walk through a snowy gothic castle courtyard. The player approaches a grand cathedral-like structure, passing robed NPCs, ascending stone stairs, and reaching a vine-covered wooden door.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wide snow-covered bridge leading toward an imposing gothic cathedral. Two robed NPCs approach from the distance and pass by the camera on either side. Snow-covered evergreens and ornate stone railings frame the pathway as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard approach to cathedral main stairs

agents.ego_description: continuing forward across the courtyard toward the main staircase

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to the cathedral entrance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the NPCs, the camera continues across the open courtyard. The snow-covered trees fall behind as the grand staircase of the cathedral becomes visible ahead. The stone railings recede into the distance while the cathedral facade grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand stone staircase of gothic cathedral

events.description: beginning to ascend the wide stone stairs toward the upper terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase toward the upper terrace entrance

entered.detail: large arched openings in the cathedral facade revealing interior shadows

segments.scene_description: The camera begins ascending the grand stone staircase leading up to the cathedral. The building's gothic facade looms closer with detailed stonework and large archways becoming visible. The remaining railings pass out of view as the climb continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace with side entrance door

events.description: turning left toward the side entrance door after reaching the top of the stairs
approaching the vine-covered wooden door under the stone archway

agents.ego_description: approaching the ornate wooden side door with iron gate, moving under the protective archway

entered.detail: dark wooden door with ornate iron gate and climbing ivy vines
stone archway framing the view to the mountains
snowy mountain peaks visible through the side archway
green climbing vines surrounding the door frame

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the camera turns left toward a side entrance. The wooden door with its ornate iron gate and climbing vines comes into focus. Through the side archway, snow-covered mountains are visible in the distance as the camera approaches the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a wide, snowy bridge toward the intimate detail of a cathedral's side entrance. It begins on a snow-covered path framed by evergreens and ornate railings, where two robed figures pass the camera as it advances toward an imposing gothic structure. As the figures recede, the open courtyard gives way to a grand stone staircase, with the cathedral's facade looming larger and its detailed stonework becoming more prominent. The camera then ascends the stairs, leaving the railings behind as the massive archways of the building dominate the frame. Finally, the view shifts left toward a side entrance, focusing on a vine-covered wooden door and an iron gate while snow-covered mountains appear in the distance through the archway.
